text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back to the academy, Tosen Jordan
stops to look closer at a poster.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There's a special art exhibit. Reminds me of a
field trip I went on.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
My teacher got mad at me for not taking my
report seriously enough.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yup... Apparently, I didn't look at the art
carefully enough or whatever. Or, like, I wrote
about the wrong stuff.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
When I read the top report in the class, it was
totally different from mine. I didn't even care at
that point, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Jordan may be easygoing, but she isn't someone
who takes her assignments lightly. Maybe she just
couldn't convey her feelings clearly.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? You mean the artwork?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Nah, I'll pass. Even if we go, it's not like I'll get it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that there's no right or wrong way to
interpret art, so I'd like her to visit the exhibit
with an open mind and treasure her own honest
impressions.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Seriously? Even though that's what I got in
trouble for before?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think this might be a good chance for her, so we
decide to go to the art museum.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: This is really not my vibe...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, we're here now anyway. Might as well check
out the art.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, isn't this the statue of the Three Goddesses
from the academy? I wonder if an alum painted it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's almost like a photo... Huh? Oh, look at
that...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wooow, interesting...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: The Murmuring and the Jungle... Whoa...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, I think I get it! It's so different seeing it as
an adult!
choice_data_list: You've been looking at things pretty seriously.
You've been looking at things pretty seriously.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I guess. It's like it was speaking to me or
something.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So you know the person who painted the picture
of the Three Goddesses statue? They painted it
because they dropped their phone in the water,
right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
They went to take a pic but got all excited and
dropped their phone in the water. But they still
wanted a pic, so they just popped off and painted
one.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And that bluish painting. It looks just like what I
see when I close my eyes after staring at my
phone for a while!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And that jungle picture is all like... you know?
When you sneak a Tarzan shout when no one's
around? So embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yup, it's completely different seeing them now
that I've grown up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... How should I respond?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... How should I respond?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Right?! Am I good or what?! Total genius!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Turns out art museums are pretty lit. Using your
imagination is fun too!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That gives me an idea. I'm going to use this as
inspiration for my nail art!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her interpretations are rather audacious, but they
appear to have inspired her in a unique way.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? No good?
choice_data_list: No, no! That's not what I mean!
No, no! That's not what I mean!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Haha. Look at you, panicking.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. You don't have to say anything. I think I
get it. Like, I know what you're trying to say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I appears I've been able to help her overcome her
old insecurities a little.
